description_long: This is a tall, industrial-style metal locker cabinet with a matte black finish, commonly found in urban environments such as schools, gyms, or public facilities. The front features two vertical doors, each equipped with a rectangular ventilation grille at the bottom and a small horizontal slot near the top, likely for labeling or mail. Each door has a handle and a lock mechanism, suggesting secure storage. The sides and back are plain, solid metal panels with no visible openings or features. The cabinet stands on four short legs, slightly elevating it off the ground. Its robust construction and utilitarian design make it suitable for storing personal belongings or equipment in high-traffic urban areas.
description: A tall, black metal locker cabinet with two vented doors, handles, and locks, designed for secure storage in urban settings. The sides and back are plain, emphasizing its industrial, utilitarian style.
description_view_0: Front view showing two vented doors with handles, locks, and label slots.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, solid metal panel with no features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat metal back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain metal panel, similar to the left side.
